# Link loyalty programs to order lines

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:d501b24fff6e108e7c056f933d5409a0efbb13b1f01991c3335e890d77c23680
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds a link in the sale order line to the program used in a discount, so
it can be easily tracked afterwards. Also eases the implementation of loyalty modules
that don't necessarily use the discount product as product for the discount line.

It also links the reward lines to:
: - The order lines that generated them, so we can follow which order lines produced
    which discounts.

  - The order lines over which the reward is applied:

    - In a discount promo: the cheapest product, specific products or the whole order.
    - In a product promo: the product lines over which the reward is discounted.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

  of the module.

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_loyalty_order_line_link.models.sale_order.SaleOrder.write
documentation:
We're looking for reward lines set in the write, from those, we'll get
the proper ids to write them into the related lines

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_loyalty_order_line_link.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._get_discounted_lines
documentation: Hook method that allows to link lines from extra discount reward options

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_loyalty_order_line_link.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._link_reward_discount_lines
documentation:
Assign reward lines depending on the discount scope of the promotion:
- A discount on order, will apply to every line.
- A discount on the cheapest product just to the cheapest line.
- A discount on specific products only on those products defined in the
  promotion and available in the order lines.
Thes filters are the same the core methods use.

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_loyalty_order_line_link.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._link_reward_product_lines
documentation:
We want to link to the reward those lines that generated it as well as
the rewarded product, that could be not in the original domain

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_loyalty_order_line_link.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._link_reward_lines
documentation:
We want to filter the lines that generated a condition and link them to
the generated rewards. Every reward type has it's own cases depending on
how's applied. Another reward types (e.g: sale_loyalty_delivery) should extend
this method adding its cases. Also to be noted that a single line could
generate several rewards coming from different promotions.

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_loyalty_order_line_link.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._link_reward_generated_lines
documentation: Link the lines that generated reward lines to those lines

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_loyalty_order_line_link.models.sale_order.SaleOrderLine.write
documentation: When the reward line is update we should refresh the line links as well

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_loyalty_order_line_link.models.sale_order.SaleOrderLine._filter_related_program_lines
documentation:
Discard those lines not in the program domain. With other modules changing
the product criteria rules, we can extend this method to return the proper
records.

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_loyalty_order_line_link.tests.test_sale_loyalty_order_line_link.TestSaleCouponCriteriaMultiProduct.test_01_coupon_order_line_link_discount
documentation:
The reward lines always get the coupon program that applied it. For the order
lines, three main cases are covered:
- Discount on specific products. Only those lines get link to the reward lines.
- Global discount. All the order lines get the link to the reward lines.

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_loyalty_order_line_link.tests.test_sale_loyalty_order_line_link.TestSaleCouponCriteriaMultiProduct.test_02_coupon_order_line_link_discount_cheapest
documentation:
Change the program discount type to a cheapest product. Now only the chepest
line will get the reward.

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_loyalty_order_line_link.tests.test_sale_loyalty_order_line_link.TestSaleCouponCriteriaMultiProduct.test_03_coupon_order_line_link_product
documentation:
The reward lines are linked to the coupon programs and the lines that
genereate the reward line are linked to that
